title: Red Ocean Funny Home 50% Of Alcohol Garden Wooden Hanging Heart Love Gardening Shed Sign GIFT
features: Suitable For Gardeners Gifts, Alcohol Gifts
description: Product Description Beautiful Handmade Gifts! Made in the UK! About Us! Red Ocean Gifts include hand crafted products developed in our UK design studio, exclusive to us. We use methods such as engraving and printing to incorporate a unique design and message that evokes a positive emotion in the recipient. Every product is delicately hand made and gift packaged, so it arrives to you in pristine condition. Unique gifts that can't be found anywhere else, we know you will find a suitable gift that will be cherished. The size of our wooden heart! Our wooden heart measure 100mm x 100mm or 10cm x 10cm! Perfect to hang on it's own, as a tag on a bag or on a neck of a bottle. Our Wood Hearts Wood Material Our designs are printed directly on to the Wood Heart which makes it last forever! Strings Included Our wood hearts are packed and come with a choice of 2 strings, black or red whichever suits you best! The perfect gift The heart is perfect to hang anywhere in the home. The perfect heart is the perfect size as a gift for a friend or family member guaranteed to make the recipient smile. The Best Things About Red Ocean Perfect as a gift Here at Red Ocean we make products that are ideal for gifting. We aim to make each receiver feel smile every time time they look at their gift. Beautiful Wood Our hearts are made out of beautiful pieces of wood so our designs can be printed onto it! High Quality We have high quality machines and material so our products will be perfect for years to come! Fast Delivery Our products will fit through the letterbox so will make the perfect gift to send to a friend or family member. Dispatched within 1 day! What happens at Red Ocean We design your gifts At Red Ocean we take great pride in our product, so we are very proud to say say our team design everything in house which are then put onto our products. Handmade products Not only do we design, we handmake and finish all our gifts in our warehouse. Sent out to you! Once the product is made it is packaged by hand to ensure the highest quality and then sent out to the customer.
